name: chr1_1q32_FCGR_locus
description: 1q32 Fc-gamma receptor (FCGR) gene cluster: FCGR2A, FCGR2B, FCGR2C, FCGR3A, FCGR3B arose by tandem segmental duplication. FCGR3B and FCGR2C show population copy-number variation associated with autoimmune disease risk.

architecture.internal_structure: Tandem array of five FCGR2/FCGR3 paralogs at 95-99% identity over their 6-8 kb gene bodies; 82 kb segmental duplication unit; CNV of FCGR3B 0-4 copies in healthy individuals.
